name: codex-job-watch
description: Durable Windows jobs with silent foreground waiting and background completion messages.

interface.shortDescription: Run durable jobs and receive completion messages.
interface.longDescription: Runs long Windows commands with durable state, logs and cancellation. Choose a silent foreground wait or a detached job that reports completion to the originating Codex task without heartbeat polling.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-job-watch to run this long Windows command and choose the appropriate wait mode.
